name: Hallowe'en Party Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Vanilla or Chocolate Frosting Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a muffin pan with paper liners, using 24-30 cups.
3. Prepare the cupcake batter according to package directions and bake until done.
4. Allow cupcakes to cool completely.
5. Frost the cooled cupcakes with vanilla or chocolate frosting.
6. To make each pumpkin:
- Cut a thin slice from one side of an orange gumdrop.
- Press the cut sides together to form a pumpkin shape.
- Place a small green gumdrop on top for the stem.
7. To make each black cat:
- Slice a large black gumdrop crosswise into three equal pieces.
- Place the bottom and top slices, with sugared sides up, on top of the cupcake for the head and body.
- Cut a thin strip from the center slice to form a curved tail and place it on the cat.
- Add two small green triangles on top for ears.
8. To make each ghost:
- Cut a marshmallow in half with scissors and flatten slightly.
- Place the flattened side on the frosted cupcake.
- Use two small green gumdrops to create eyes on the ghost.
9. Serve and enjoy your Halloween Party Cupcakes!
